title: cynoglossum lanceolatum f. albiflorum
intro: Cynoglossum lanceolatum f. albiflorum, also known as white-hued wolf's mouth, is a rare and lesser-known variant of the Cynoglossum lanceolatum plant. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, boasting a range of medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Cynoglossum lanceolatum f. albiflorum are said to include alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Cynoglossum lanceolatum f. albiflorum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, for its medicinal and health benefits.
